Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - User across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - User per case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time required to complete Accepted + Wait - User after its initiation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Time between Accepted + Wait - User and the subsequent Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User compared to the duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment within the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - Implementation within the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - Vendor within the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Time elapsed from the start of a case until Accepted + Wait - User is first performed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Time between the completion of Accepted + Wait - User and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - User for cases that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - User in variants that end with Completed + Closed versus those that end with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait - User to Completed + In Call when both activities occur in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User in variants containing multiple wait states (e.g., Accepted + Wait - User followed by another Accepted + Wait - User)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Time between the preceding Accepted + In Progress and Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Total waiting time attributable to Accepted + Wait - User relative to the total cycle time of the case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait - User and Completed + Resolved across all variants where both occur
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time from case start to Accepted + Wait - User in variants that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User when it directly precedes Completed + Resolved versus when it is followed by another Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Wait - User and the final activity of the case, distinguishing between Completed + Closed and Completed + In Call outcomes
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Closed'
